item.description: AI Safety research: We find that reasoning models don't always accurately verbalize their reasoning. This casts doubt on ... (Source: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Alignment Science] Sabotage Evaluations for Frontier Models
item.description: AI Safety research: How well could AI models mislead us, or secretly sabotage tasks, if they were trying to? We describe... (Source: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Alignment Science] Simple Probes can Catch Sleeper Agents
item.description: AI Safety research: We find that probing, a simple interpretability technique, can detect when backdoored "sleeper agent... (Source: Alignment Science)

item.title: [Alignment Science] Sleeper Agents: Training Deceptive LLMs that Persist Through Safety Training
item.description: AI Safety research: We train LLMs to act secretly malicious. We find that, despite our best efforts at alignment trainin... (Source: Alignment Science)
